Start free. Scale with confidence. Pay only for what you need.

Free
$0 / forever

Perfect for individuals and small teams getting started.

  • CLI scanner (all 4 clouds)
  • Basic auto-fix
  • Local Flask dashboard
  • Open source
  • Community support
Get Started Free
🔥 MOST POPULAR
Pro
$500 / month

For growing teams that need multi-tenant visibility and approvals.

  • Everything in Free
  • Multi-tenant dashboard
  • Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
  • Slack/Teams approval workflow
  • Branded compliance reports
  • Email support within 24 hours
  • Up to 10 cloud accounts
Start Pro Trial
Enterprise
Custom

For large organisations with complex security needs.

  • Everything in Pro
  • Unlimited cloud accounts
  • 24/7 support with SLA
  • SOC2 & HIPAA add-ons
  • Dedicated deployment
  • Custom integrations
  • Annual security reviews
